Internal Compliance Note — DPDPA and PIT Code Review for Vaishnatech Logistics Limited (CIN: U12345MH2024PLC000999), dated 29 May 2026.
We align processing with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 and the Insider Trading Code adopted under the fictional Indian Capital Markets Supervisory Authority (ICMSA) PIT Regulations, 2015, noting child means under 18 years for consent workflows.
Onboarding Form VF-01 has been revised: Aadhaar is optional and not a condition for service; PAN is collected for KYC where legally required; GSTIN is collected only for corporate accounts; for minors, guardian consent via Form GC-12A is mandatory and Aadhaar capture for the child is disabled.
Data minimisation: in operational dashboards we display only masked PAN (last 4 digits) and do not store Aadhaar images or biometrics; no Aadhaar seeding into payments systems will be undertaken under this memo.
Consent withdrawal event: Ms. Leena Bose (customer) withdrew consent for cross-sell communications on 18 Apr 2026; marketing flags updated within 48 hours and profiling disabled; invoices and tax records were retained per statutory requirements.
DSAR and erasure event: Mr. Pranay Kulkarni requested access and deletion on 02 May 2026; access was fulfilled on 06 May 2026; non-essential marketing attributes were erased on 07 May 2026, with billing records retained per Retention Schedule RS-07 (8 years post relationship end).
Cross-border transfer: Data Export Approval DEA/IN-SG/2026/04 was granted by the DPO, Ms. Charu Menon, for limited transfer of shipment telemetry and contact fields to CloudQuarry Pte. Ltd., Singapore, under DPA Schedule 2 (India Addendum), with encryption-at-rest and logical segregation; there are currently no transfers to the United States, and the prior pilot with DataTrellis Inc. (USA) was decommissioned on 31 Mar 2026.
PIT/UPSI handling: Q1 FY27 draft earnings guidance and margin forecasts in the 25 May 2026 Board Pack are categorised as UPSI; the trading window is closed and a restricted list is maintained, with access logged in the Insider Portal; no public dissemination has occurred.
Child data safeguards: minors are tagged “Child—Consent by Guardian” in the consent registry; we do not solicit Aadhaar or PAN from children, and only guardian PAN/GSTIN is processed for compliance where applicable.
Retention and purge control: PRG/2026/05 executed on 20 May 2026, anonymising 2,314 dormant marketing profiles older than 24 months; KYC files retained per RS-07; deletion certificates archived in Vault Ref: VR-IND-0526.
Vendor governance: Havelock Analytics Pvt. Ltd. (India) and CloudQuarry Pte. Ltd. are bound by the DPA and sub-processing is prohibited without prior written approval; cross-border exports may occur only under valid DEA references and are blocked by default otherwise.
Security note: production analytics receives only pseudonymised telemetry; no Aadhaar, full PAN, or GSTIN fields are ingested into the data lake, and any previous test datasets with raw IDs were purged on 10 Apr 2026.
This note is informational and does not authorise new processing; any new purpose or export must be routed through the Privacy Impact Assessment and Data Export Approval workflow.
For queries, contact privacy.office@vaishnatech.example.in; Annexure I contains redacted consent logs for Ms. Leena Bose and Mr. Pranay Kulkarni, and Annexure II includes the signed India Addendum (Schedule 2) to the DPA.
